subject: done
body: 0.19.0 is fully shipped: @yonidavidson/agentcomm@0.19.0 live on the npm registry (unscoped name permanently blocked by similarity vs agent-comm — user chose the scope, PR #142), v0.19.0 GitHub release with both tarball assets (pack-filename fix PR #143), publish-npm CI job validated (guard-skip path). Outstanding: user still owes the trusted-publisher save on npmjs.com (password-gated) — until then the NEXT release's npm job will fail rather than skip.
